name: macos-appearance-changer
title: macOS Appearance Changer
description: Create and apply custom macOS appearance profiles with wallpaper, icon style, and dark mode
author: huzef44

commands.name: toggle-profiles
commands.title: Toggle Profiles
commands.description: Quickly toggle between two appearance profiles

commands.name: configure-toggle
commands.title: Configure Toggle Pair
commands.description: Choose which two profiles to toggle between

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
